publicationStmt.publisher: Die Schriftkultur des christlichen Äthiopiens und Eritreas: Eine multimediale Forschungsumgebung / Beta maṣāḥǝft

licence.p: This file is licensed under the Creative Commons Attribution-ShareAlike 4.0.

extent.note: Parchment and paper manuscript fragments of different sizes on guards.

item.q: Deposited by the Secretary of India 28 August 1868. With a few written fragments bought by B.R.> Holmes, Dec. 1868

history.provenance: This current unit of circulation was very probably created by the British Library from several fragments not originally belonging together, some of which were acquired by Richard Holmes during the British Napier expedition in 1868, while others were part of the collection of Madḫāne ʿĀlam, and looted by the British Napier expedition in 1868. These latter fragments had very probably belonged to a church in the Gondar area, from where they were taken by Tewodros and brought to Madḫāne ʿĀlam.

bibl.title: Catalogue of the Ethiopic Manuscripts in the British Museum Acquired since the Year 1847

decoNote.desc: A picture of God the Father, surrounded by the emblems of the Evangelists
A picture of Archangel with attendant angels

decoNote.desc: A picture of St George slaying the dragon

bibl.title: Catalogue of the Ethiopic Manuscripts in the British Museum Acquired since the Year 1847

decoNote.desc: A picture executed in Indian ink representing Flight into Egypt

bibl.title: Catalogue of the Ethiopic Manuscripts in the British Museum Acquired since the Year 1847

msItem.title: Book of Jeremiah, ch. I:1 to III:19
Book of Jeremiah, ch. XXII:17 to XVIII:18

handNote.desc: The manuscript is neatly written in a seventeenth century hand.

item.desc: The name of the scribe, Takla Hāymānot at the foot of the page.
The name of later owner, ወለተ፡ ስ እስ ራኤል፡, at the top of the page.

bibl.title: Catalogue of the Ethiopic Manuscripts in the British Museum Acquired since the Year 1847

handNote.desc: The leaf is neatly written in a seventeenth century hand.

bibl.title: Catalogue of the Ethiopic Manuscripts in the British Museum Acquired since the Year 1847

msItem.title: Rāʾǝya taʾammǝr
msItem.incipit: በስመ፡ አብ፡ ዝንቱ፡ መጽሐፍ፡ እምቅድመ፡ ያነብቡ፡ ተአምሪሃ፡ ለማርያም፡ ዘይትነበብ፡ ዘተናገረ፡ ፩ኃጥእ፡ በዘይተ፡ ፍቅራ፡ ለማርያም፡ ውጉዕ፡ ጸሎታ፡ ወበረከታ፡ ወምሕረተ፡ ፍቁር፡ ወልዳ፡ የሃሉ፡ ምስለ፡ ነፍሰ፡ ንጉሥነ፡ ኢያሱ፡ ለዓለመ፡ ዓለም፡ አሜን። ። ። ። ራዕየ፡ ተአምር፡ ዘርእየ፡ ዮሐንስ፡ ወልደ፡ ነጐድጓድ፡ ዘርእየ፡ ተአምሪሃ፡ ለማርደም።

bibl.title: Catalogue of the Ethiopic Manuscripts in the British Museum Acquired since the Year 1847
Catalogue of the Ethiopic Manuscripts in the British Museum Acquired since the Year 1847
Catalogue of the Ethiopic Manuscripts in the British Museum Acquired since the Year 1847

msItem.title: Letter to Tewodros from an Egyptian official, dated 1271 H., in Arabic

bibl.title: Catalogue of the Ethiopic Manuscripts in the British Museum Acquired since the Year 1847
Catalogue of the Ethiopic Manuscripts in the British Museum Acquired since the Year 1847

msItem.title: Hymn to the Miracles of ʾEwosṭātewos
msItem.incipit: እምብዝኀ፡ ተአምሪከ፡ አቀድም፡ አሐተ። ኤዎስጣቴዎስ፡ ዘትገብር፡ ዓበይተ፡ ኃይላተ።

msItem.title: Hymn to ʾEwosṭātewos
msItem.incipit: እንዘ፡ ሀሎኩ፡ በተሰዶ፡ ወበተሞቅሖ፡ ዕፁብ። ተዝካረ፡ ዕድወትከ፡ ባሕረ፡ ከመ፡ እዜኑ፡ ለሕዝብ። ኤዎስጣቴዎስ፡ ሀበኒ፡ ልሳነ፡ አግአዚ፡ ጥበብ።

msItem.title: Hymn to ʾabbā Salāmā
msItem.incipit: እዌጥን፡ እንዘ፡ እብል፡ ወእነግር፡ ክሡተ፡ እምገድልከ፡ ብዙኅ፡ አየድዕ፡ ንስቲተ፡

collation.note: The manuscript consists of one quire, according to Wright, the last quire of a hymn book.

bibl.title: Catalogue of the Ethiopic Manuscripts in the British Museum Acquired since the Year 1847

msItem.note: Leaves are missing after each leaf.

msItem.title: Part of a tract of the duties of the priest

item.desc: The name of the original owner has been erased and substituted by those of ገብረ፡ ማርያም፡ and ፈርከሊላ፡.

bibl.title: Catalogue of the Ethiopic Manuscripts in the British Museum Acquired since the Year 1847

msItem.title: Malkǝʾa Yoḥannǝs Maṭmǝq
msItem.incipit: በስመ፡ እግዚአብሔር፡ እሳት፡ በሐቅለ፡ ሕሊና፡ ነዳዲ። ወበስመ፡ ማርያም፡ ድንግል፡ መጥበቢተ፡ ዓለም፡ አባዲ።

bibl.title: Catalogue of the Ethiopic Manuscripts in the British Museum Acquired since the Year 1847

q.seg: ዝዳዊት፡ ዘተክለ፡ ሃይማኖት፡ ወዘእሕቱ፡ ሠንዶ፡ ዘቃቂት፡ ላክ፡ ከመይኩኖ፡ ሙ፡ ለመድኃኒተ፡ ነፍሶሙ፡ ወሥጋሆም፡

bibl.title: Catalogue of the Ethiopic Manuscripts in the British Museum Acquired since the Year 1847

msItem.title: Part of a hymn to Michael

bibl.title: Catalogue of the Ethiopic Manuscripts in the British Museum Acquired since the Year 1847

msItem.title: Hymns and prayers for the canonical hours of Good Friday

item.desc: The name of the owner was ዮሴፍ፡ ().

msItem.title: Part of a hymn to Michael

bibl.title: Catalogue of the Ethiopic Manuscripts in the British Museum Acquired since the Year 1847

msItem.title: Malkǝʾ-hymn to St Andrew the Apostle
msItem.incipit: ሰላም፡ ለዝክረ፡ ስምከ፡ ዘምዑዝ፡ ጣዕማ። አምሳለ፡ ማርያም፡ ድንግል፡ ዘጥዑም፡ ስማ። ሰላማ፡ እንድርያስ፡ ዳግማየ፡ እንድርያስ፡ ወሰላማ። ታስተበጽዑከ፡ ሊቃውንተ፡ ሞገስ፡ ወግርማ።
msItem.colophon: The colophon apparently refers to the author of the work, which is referred to as dǝrsān. ለዝንቱ፡ ድርሳን፡ ደራሲሁ፡ የዘይቤ፡ ጌታ፡ ወልደ፡ ተክሌ፡ ዘደብረ፡ አቡነ፡ አፍጼ።

bibl.title: Catalogue of the Ethiopic Manuscripts in the British Museum Acquired since the Year 1847

msItem.title: List of Books of the Old and New Testaments, canonical and apocryphal, with some other works

handNote.desc: The manuscript is fairly written, of the nineteenth century.

bibl.title: Catalogue of the Ethiopic Manuscripts in the British Museum Acquired since the Year 1847

projectDesc.p: Encoded according to TEI P5 Guidelines.

encodingDesc.p: Encoded according to the Beta maṣāḥǝft Guidelines. These Guidelines detail the TEI format ruled by the Beta maṣāḥǝft Schema. The present TEI file is enriched with an Xquery transformation taking advantage of the exist-db database instance where the data is stored and of the many external resources to which this data points to.

calendar.p: ʿĀmata ʿālam/ʿĀmata ʾəm-fəṭrat (Era of the World)
ʿĀmata śəggāwe (Era of the Incarnation – Ethiopian)

t:revisionDesc.change: Changed msFrag to msPart and added p3
Added new msParts and renumbered the existing.
Continued description from historical catalogue entry and information provided by Ilana Tahan in August 2019.

t:div.t:ab: ወኈልቈ፡ መጻሕፍት፡ ዘቤተ፡ ክርስቲያን፡ ብሉይ፡ ወሐዲስ። ኦሪት፡ ፰ብሔር፡ ዘፍጥረት፡ ዘፀአት፡ ዘሌዋውያን፡ ሀኍልቍ፡ ዘዳግም፡ ሕግ፡ ዘኢያሱ፡ ዘመሳፍንት፡ ዘሩት፡ ኩፍሌ፡ ፩ ነገሥት፡ ፱ ሕፀፃን፡ ፪ ዕዝራ፡ ፪ ኢዮብ፡ ፩ ዳዊት፡ ፩ ሰሎሞን፡ ፭ ኢሳይያስ፡ ፩ ኢርምስ፡ ፩፡ ሕዝቅስ፡ ፩ ዳንኤል፡ ፩፡ ሆሴዕ፡ ፩ አምጽ፡ ፩ ሚኪያስ፡ ፩ ኢዩኤል፡ ፩ አብድዩ፡ ፩ ዮናስ፡ ፩ ናሆም፡ ፩ እንባቆም፡ ፩ ሶፎንያስ፡ ፩ ሐጌ፡ ፩ ዘካርያስ፡ ፩ ሚልኪያስ፡ ፩ ዮዲት፡ ፩ ጦቢት፡ ፩ አስቴር፡ ፩ መቃብያን፡ ፪ ሲራክ፡ ፩ ወንጌል፡ ፬ ጳውሎስ፡ ፲፬ መልእክታተ፡ ሐዋርያት፡ ፯ አቡቀለምሱስ፡ ፩ ግብረ፡ ሐዋርያት፡ ሲኖድስ፡ ፰። አረጋዊ፡ መንፈሳዊ፡ ፩፡ ማር፡ ይስሐቅ። ፊልኪስዩስ፡ ፩ ፍትሐ፡ ነገሥት፡ ፩፡ አፈ፡ ወርቅ፡ ፩፡ ቄርሎስ፡ ፩፡ ሓዊ፡ ፩፡ መጽሐፈ፡ ምስጢር፡ ፩፡ መጽሐፈ፡ ጸደል፡ ፩፡ ሄርማ፡ አንድ። ዜና፡ አበው፡ ፩። ገድለ፡ ሐዋርያት፡ ፲፪፡ አቡ፡ ሳክር፡ ፩፡ ስንክሳር፡ ዘዓመት። ድርሳነ፡ ኤፍሬም፡ ፩፡ ነገረ፡ ማርያም፡ ፩፡ ባሮክ፡ ፩፡ ባርቶስ፡ ቆጵርያኖስ፡ ፩። ስስንዮስ፡ ፩፡ ምዕዳን፡ ፩፡ ራዕየ፡ ቶማስ፡ ፩።
